meta.title: AGI Pathways: Tomorrow's Futures
meta.description: A web-based strategy game about AI safety and governance. Shape the future of AGI.

landing.title: AGI Pathways: Tomorrow's Futures
landing.tagline: Shape the future of AI. Learn, imagine, and act.
landing.description: Imagine futures worth protecting. Learn how advanced AI might reshape our world. Explore pathways to harm and build defences. Create your own action plan for AI safety and governance.
landing.howItWorksBody: Five units guide you from imagining better futures to writing a simple action plan. No login needed — your progress is saved in your browser.
landing.disclaimer: This is an independent capstone project by Joshua Williams for the BlueDot Impact AGI Strategy Course; it is not associated with BlueDot Impact or its staff.
landing.aboutBody: This game is designed for ages 8+ and works on phones, tablets, and computers. You'll create a Threat Card, a Defence Map, and a Personal Action Plan.

1.title: Racing to a Better Future
1.intro: Imagine your future and the world's future. What do you want to protect?

2.title: Drivers of AI Progress
2.intro: See how AI gets better: compute, algorithms, and data.

3.title: Pathways to Harm
3.intro: Choose what to protect and explore how things could go wrong.

4.title: Defence in Depth
4.intro: Build layers of defence: prevent, constrain, and withstand.

5.title: Start Contributing
5.intro: Choose an intervention and make a simple action plan.

unit1.personalFuturePrompt: What does a good week in your future look like? (e.g. school, family, hobbies)
unit1.societalSliders: How important are these for the world? Move the sliders.

unit3.chooseAsset: What do you want to protect?
